headline: Starbucks China Exit And Q2 Turnaround Tested Against Rich Valuation
summary: Starbucks, NasdaqGS:SBUX, has finalized the sale of its China business to a local partner. The company reports a turnaround with strong Q2 momentum, better customer traffic, and successful menu innovation. These operational updates come alongside a current share price of $104.26. For investors watching NasdaqGS:SBUX, this combination of a China exit and Q2 progress adds fresh context beyond routine quarterly headlines. The stock is up 9.5% over the past 30 days, 24.2% year to date, and...

headline: Target is trying to win back busy families from Walmart, starting with the baby aisle
summary: Target is refreshing its baby category as part of a broader effort to offer better products and more convenience to compete with Walmart and Amazon.
